title: Summarize Deployment Log
description: Parse a deployment log where each line contains a service name followed by SUCCESS or FAILED. Return a summary dictionary with total count, succeeded count, failed count, and a sorted list of failed service names.
constraints: Each line is in the format: service_name SUCCESS|FAILED
failed_services list must be sorted alphabetically
Return zero counts and empty list for empty input
Lines with unrecognized status should be skipped

examples.input:
auth-service SUCCESS
api-gateway FAILED
payment-service SUCCESS
notif-service FAILED
examples.explanation: 4 services deployed; 2 succeeded (auth-service, payment-service) and 2 failed (api-gateway, notif-service). Failed services are returned in sorted order.

test_cases.description: Four services with two successes and two failures
test_cases.input:
auth-service SUCCESS
api-gateway FAILED
payment-service SUCCESS
notif-service FAILED

test_cases.description: All services succeed returns zero failures
